metrics_semantics.primary_values: downloads, first_time_downloads, impressions, product_page_views and taps are filtered to rows where Date == report_date.
metrics_semantics.total_available_values: *_total_available fields preserve the previous unfiltered aggregate across all rows returned by Apple Analytics.

positioning.goal: Vendre les apps et construire un revenu logiciel indépendant.
positioning.doctrine: Transformer l'expertise de production en apps macOS premium qui économisent du temps, réduisent les erreurs et rendent les workflows créatifs plus contrôlables.

localizations.promotional_text: Comparez une vidéo originale et une nouvelle version, détectez les changements localement, puis préparez un conform audio avec cutlist et export AAF.
localizations.description:
Coupez! est un outil macOS pour les équipes de post-production qui doivent comparer des versions image, détecter les coupes localement et préparer un conform audio plus propre.

La grande nouveauté de la version 2.0 est Comparer 2 vidéos : chargez une vidéo originale et une nouvelle version, laissez Coupez! analyser les deux fichiers localement, puis vérifiez les changements de montage détectés avec des previews source et cible synchronisées.

Coupez! aide les monteurs, assistants montage, sound editors et superviseurs workflow à comprendre ce qui a changé entre deux versions image avant de reconstruire ou mettre à jour une session audio.

Fonctions principales :

• Comparaison d’une vidéo originale et d’une nouvelle version
• Génération locale d’un résumé de changements de conform
• Vérification avec previews source/cible synchronisées
• Détection de changements de plan dans une vidéo locale
• Validation manuelle des coupes détectées
• Export AAF avec piste de coupes et piste de marqueurs
• Préparation de workflows conform pour sessions Pro Tools
• Conversion vidéo locale comme outil complémentaire

Vos médias restent sur votre Mac. Coupez! n’a pas besoin d’un service cloud pour analyser, comparer, convertir ou exporter vos fichiers.

Le téléchargement inclut 3 analyses vidéo gratuites avec export AAF. Débloquez ensuite l’analyse et la comparaison illimitées avec un achat unique.

Utilisez Coupez! pour comparer des révisions image, comprendre les changements de montage et préparer plus vite le conform audio.
localizations.whats_new:
- Ajout de Comparer 2 vidéos comme grande nouveauté de la version 2.0.
- Comparez une image originale et une nouvelle version pour identifier les changements de montage.
- Ajout de previews source/cible synchronisées pour vérifier les différences de conform.
- Ajout de résumés de changements conçus pour les workflows audio Pro Tools.
- Ajout de la conversion vidéo locale comme outil secondaire intégré.
- Amélioration du parcours d’analyse, de vérification et d’export pour les équipes de post-production.

localizations.promotional_text: Compare an original and revised video, detect editorial changes locally, then prepare a cleaner audio conform with cutlists and AAF export.
localizations.description:
Coupez! is a macOS tool for post-production teams who need to compare picture versions, detect cuts locally, and prepare cleaner audio conform workflows.

The major new feature in version 2.0 is Compare 2 videos: load an original video and a revised version, let Coupez! analyze both files locally, then review the detected editorial changes with synchronized source and target previews.

Coupez! helps editors, assistant editors, sound editors and workflow supervisors understand what changed between two picture versions before rebuilding or updating an audio session.

Main features:

• Compare an original video and a revised version
• Generate a local conform change summary
• Review synchronized source/target previews
• Detect shot changes in a single local video
• Manually validate detected cuts
• Export an AAF with cut and marker tracks
• Prepare conform workflows for Pro Tools sessions
• Convert local video as an extra utility

Your media stays on your Mac. Coupez! does not require a cloud service to analyze, compare, convert, or export your files.

Download includes 3 free video analyses with AAF export. Unlock unlimited analysis and comparison with a one-time purchase.

Use Coupez! when you need to compare picture revisions, understand editorial changes, and prepare audio conform work faster.
localizations.whats_new:
- Added Compare 2 videos as the major new feature in version 2.0.
- Compare an original picture and a revised version to identify editorial changes.
- Added synchronized source/target previews for reviewing conform differences.
- Added conform change summaries designed for Pro Tools audio workflows.
- Added integrated local video conversion as a secondary utility.
- Improved local analysis, review, and export flow for post-production teams.

localizations.promotional_text: メロディを録音し、音符を見て、ピアノ鍵盤で再現。実際の音から耳を鍛えるシンプルな練習アプリです。
localizations.description:
Perroquet Pianoは、短いメロディを「聴く・見る・弾く」練習に変える音楽アプリです。

声、楽器、曲の一部をマイクで録音すると、Perroquetが音を解析し、練習しやすいメロディラインとしてピアノ鍵盤に音符を表示します。

できること：
• 短いメロディで耳を鍛える
• 音符を見ながら鍵盤で再現する
• 速いフレーズをゆっくり確認する
• 複雑な解析結果を練習しやすく簡略化する
• 音色を変えながらフレーズを覚える

Perroquetは、聴いて、音を見つけて、メロディを弾くためのシンプルな練習ツールです。
localizations.keywords: 音楽,鍵盤,耳コピ,メロディ,音符,歌,声,採譜,ピッチ,練習,録音,再現,学習
localizations.whats_new: Perroquet 1.2では、主旋律の選択精度を改善し、Basic Pitchの診断情報を追加しました。解析JSONの保存にも対応し、あとから再読み込みしやすくなりました。

localizations.promotional_text: Record a melody, see the notes, and replay it on the piano keyboard. A simple way to train your ear from real sound.
localizations.description:
Perroquet Piano helps you turn short melodies into something you can hear, see, and replay.

Record your voice, an instrument, or a song with the microphone. Perroquet analyzes the sound, extracts a playable melodic line, and shows the notes on a piano keyboard so you can practice them step by step.

Use it to:
• train your ear with short melodic phrases
• replay a melody note by note on the keyboard
• slow down playback when a phrase is too fast
• simplify dense analyses into something easier to practice
• switch instrument sounds while learning the phrase

Perroquet is designed for quick musical practice: listen, find the notes, replay the melody.
localizations.whats_new: Perroquet 1.2 improves melody analysis with better main melody selection, clearer Basic Pitch diagnostics, and saved JSON analysis exports that can be reloaded more easily.

localizations.promotional_text: Enregistre une mélodie, vois les notes, puis rejoue-la au piano. Une façon simple de travailler ton oreille à partir du son réel.
localizations.description:
Perroquet Piano transforme une courte mélodie en notes que tu peux écouter, voir et rejouer.

Enregistre ta voix, un instrument ou une chanson avec le micro. Perroquet analyse le son, extrait une ligne mélodique jouable et affiche les notes sur un clavier piano pour t’entraîner étape par étape.

Utilise Perroquet pour :
• travailler ton oreille avec de courtes phrases musicales
• rejouer une mélodie note par note au clavier
• ralentir la lecture quand une phrase va trop vite
• simplifier une analyse trop dense pour mieux pratiquer
• changer de son d’instrument pendant l’apprentissage

Perroquet est conçu pour une pratique musicale directe : écoute, retrouve les notes, rejoue la mélodie.
localizations.whats_new: Perroquet 1.2 améliore l’analyse mélodique : meilleure sélection de la ligne principale, diagnostics Basic Pitch plus précis, et sauvegarde des analyses JSON pour les recharger plus facilement.

localizations.promotional_text: New in 1.3: LFE analysis, silence detection, a redesigned Colors window, and bug fixes for smoother delivery checks.
localizations.description:
Glass Master is a macOS app for audio delivery checks and finishing preparation.

Analyse single files or batches for Integrated Loudness, Loudness Range, True Peak, duration, and timing context, then validate results against reusable compliance presets. Measure dialogue loudness, review consistency across files, and generate clear PDF reports for clients, QC, or internal sign-off.

Glass Master also helps streamline finishing workflows with batch processing, automation options, and video export tools designed for fast broadcast and streaming delivery checks.
localizations.whats_new: Version 1.3 adds LFE analysis, silence detection, a redesigned Colors window, and bug fixes.

localizations.promotional_text: Generate your music cue sheets and EDLs instantly from your Pro Tools sessions in just one click!
localizations.description:
Odile is the perfect companion tool for music editors, re-recording mixers, and all audio post-production professionals. Stop wasting hours manually logging timecodes: Odile connects directly to your open Pro Tools session to automatically generate clean, adjustable, and delivery-ready EDLs (Edit Decision Lists).

Thanks to its deep integration with the PTSL API, Odile analyzes your tracks and saves you precious time when delivering projects or filing copyright reports.

KEY FEATURES:

Seamless Pro Tools Integration
Odile communicates directly with Pro Tools. Select your tracks in your session, and the app automatically retrieves and analyzes the regions to build an exploitable chronological table.

Smart Region Analysis
The app intelligently ignores technical renders (like Audio Process Stream) and automatically merges generic clips (named mu, mus, etc.) with adjacent music cues to keep your list clean and accurate.

Advanced Timecode Management
View and adjust your in-points, out-points, and durations with absolute precision (HH:MM:SS:FF). You can even apply a global offset (+/-) to your entire list in just a few clicks.

Professional Editing & Exports

Interactive Table: Delete entries, edit content, and copy/paste directly within the cells.
Excel Export (.xlsx): Generate a comprehensive spreadsheet with a polished layout, including title/date blocks, frozen headers, and color-coding.
Clipboard (CSV): Copy the entire list in one click to paste it into an email or your own documents.
Bi-directional Sync (Markers)
Send data smartly from Odile's table back into your Pro Tools session by automatically creating Memory Locations (Markers) at the exact timecodes.

Odile naturally fits into demanding professional workflows. Spend less time on technical paperwork and more time doing what matters: the sound.

localizations.description:
FeedBacks is a standalone macOS app for turning mix feedback notes into timeline markers.
Key features:
• Import feedback from text files or clipboard
• Parse and preview feedback rows in-app
• Send selected markers directly into Pro Tools via embedded Python/PTSL
• Export markers to AAF for use in other DAWs, with selectable frame rate
• Customize the interface and marker display via a dedicated Colors window (cmd + shift + C)
localizations.keywords: Pro Tools, feedback, mix, audio, DAW, AAF, markers, import, music, timeline

localizations.promotional_text: Train your musical ear with quick melody challenges, tactile keyboard play, and Game Center leaderboards across DoReQuiz modes.
localizations.description:
DoReQuiz turns musical listening into a tactile game.

Listen to a short melody, find the notes on the keyboard, and progress round after round. The app is designed to train musical hearing without a complicated interface: a clear keyboard, immediate feedback, several difficulty modes, and a playful visual style inspired by small electronic instruments.

Included modes:
- Guided mode: keys light up to show the melody.
- Easy mode: short phrases on one octave.
- Normal mode: longer and more demanding melodies.
- Instrument quiz: listen to a sound and choose the matching image.
- Chords: find several notes played together.
- Freestyle: play freely on the keyboard.

DoReQuiz is made for beginners, children, curious musicians, and anyone who wants to practice listening, melodic memory, and note recognition in a direct way.

No theory required to start: listen, play, repeat.
localizations.whats_new: Game Center leaderboards are now enabled so players can compare their best scores across DoReQuiz modes.

localizations.whats_new: Improved iPad menu presentation, clearer score feedback, Game Center score support, and more reliable playback for repeated notes.

analysis_instruction: Produire une réflexion stratégique longue seulement si les données le justifient: utiliser les valeurs primaires filtrées sur report_date pour tout diagnostic quotidien et toute comparaison; les champs *_total_available servent uniquement à l'audit de collecte. Lire freshness/report_date, history J-7/J-30, funnel_by_source, funnel_by_territory, sales/pricing, reviews, metadata, screenshot_inventory et quality_signals. Distinguer signal réel, bruit probable, hypothèse et donnée manquante. Avant toute recommandation produit, pricing, ASO, screenshots ou metadata, vérifier app.review_pipeline: si has_blocking_pipeline_change vaut true ou si une version est READY_FOR_REVIEW, WAITING_FOR_REVIEW, IN_REVIEW, PENDING_APPLE_RELEASE, PENDING_DEVELOPER_RELEASE, PROCESSING_FOR_APP_STORE ou WAITING_FOR_EXPORT_COMPLIANCE, traiter ces changements comme déjà engagés et proposer uniquement des actions compatibles.

review_pipeline_source.versions: App Store Connect appStoreVersions endpoint, best effort
review_pipeline_source.sensitive_fields: App Review contact, demo account and notes are redacted from committed JSON

pricing_sales_source.pricing: App Store Connect appPriceSchedule endpoint, best effort
pricing_sales_source.sales: App Store Connect salesReports DAILY SALES SUMMARY, best effort, preserving previous values when refresh is unavailable

market_intelligence_source.history: local reports/*.json raw App Store Analytics rows
market_intelligence_source.source_and_territory_funnels: local raw engagement/download rows grouped by Source Type and Territory
market_intelligence_source.reviews: App Store Connect customerReviews endpoint, best effort
market_intelligence_source.metadata: App Store Connect appInfos endpoint plus review_pipeline version localizations, best effort
market_intelligence_source.screenshots: App Store Connect appScreenshotSets endpoint via appStoreVersionLocalization ids, best effort
limitations: Sales source is not attributable to App Store discovery source.
Screenshot inventory stores counts and file metadata, not OCR or visual quality.
Customer review availability can vary by platform, territory, account permissions and review volume.

store_capabilities_source.in_app_purchases: App Store Connect inAppPurchases endpoints, best effort
store_capabilities_source.subscriptions: App Store Connect subscriptionGroups/subscriptions endpoints, best effort
store_capabilities_source.game_center: App Store Connect gameCenterDetail endpoint, read-only best effort
